Script.name: Geyser Markdown Bootstrap
Script.script:
local home = getMudletHomeDir() local candidates = { home .. "/geyser-markdown", home .. "/geyser-markdown-label", home .. "/packages/geyser-markdown", }
local root for _, path in ipairs(candidates) do if io.exists(path .. "/lua/init.lua") then root = path break end end
if not root then error("Geyser Markdown package could not locate lua/init.lua in expected package directories") end
_G.GeyserMarkdownPackageRoot = root dofile(root .. "/lua/init.lua")
